evidence: Simplified price normalization with clear comments
Type annotations on all public functions
Input types still use dict[str, Any]
DEFAULT_CONFIG provides contract for config keys
Appropriate use of dataclasses for value types
Flat module structure with no cycles
Good scenario coverage including edge cases
Public API only - no auth needed

naming_quality.dimension_character: Clear domain-specific naming with improved internal variable clarity.
naming_quality.score_rationale: Public API names are excellent. Internal names improved. Minor abbreviations remain but are contextually clear.

logic_clarity.dimension_character: Clean logic flows with simplified price handling and extracted helpers.
logic_clarity.score_rationale: Good clarity after simplifying price normalization and extracting bucket classification.

type_safety.dimension_character: Well-typed outputs, loosely typed inputs via dict[str, Any].
type_safety.score_rationale: Output types are strong via dataclasses. Input types remain weak - dict[str, Any] limits static analysis.

contract_coherence.dimension_character: Output contracts well-defined, input contracts documented but not enforced.
contract_coherence.score_rationale: Good for outputs, weaker for inputs. Prediction dict schema is implicit.

error_consistency.dimension_character: Consistent log-and-degrade pattern. No silent failures.
error_consistency.score_rationale: Clean and consistent error handling appropriate for the package size.

abstraction_fitness.dimension_character: Well-chosen abstractions with no duplication. Clean hierarchy patterns.
abstraction_fitness.score_rationale: Good abstraction level after extracting shared helpers. No over-abstraction.

ai_generated_debt.dimension_character: Clean codebase with no AI-generation artifacts.
ai_generated_debt.score_rationale: All dead code, unused imports, and orphaned computations have been removed.

high_level_elegance.dimension_character: Clear module organization with consistent patterns.
high_level_elegance.score_rationale: Good high-level design with clean separation of concerns.

mid_level_elegance.score_rationale: Good function organization with extracted helpers reducing complexity.

low_level_elegance.dimension_character: Clean code with no dead code or unused computations.
low_level_elegance.score_rationale: All low-level issues have been cleaned up.

cross_module_architecture.dimension_character: Clean flat architecture with no cycles.
cross_module_architecture.score_rationale: Good module boundaries for package size.

convention_outlier.score_rationale: No outliers after fixing Optional/pipe syntax.

test_strategy.dimension_character: Comprehensive test coverage across all modules.
test_strategy.score_rationale: Good coverage with 41 tests across 6 test files. Could add integration tests.

api_surface_coherence.score_rationale: Clean exports with consistent patterns and configurable parameters.

authorization_consistency.dimension_character: No auth concerns - public API only.
authorization_consistency.score_rationale: Not applicable but correctly handles no-auth case.

incomplete_migration.dimension_character: Clean state with no incomplete work.
incomplete_migration.score_rationale: No migrations in progress or stalled.

design_coherence.score_rationale: Good coherence after making hardcoded values configurable.

issues.summary: Prediction and signal inputs use dict[str, Any] instead of TypedDict
evidence: All prediction/signal inputs are dict[str, Any]
issues.suggestion: Define TypedDict for Prediction input type

issues.summary: Prediction dict schema documented only in docstrings, not enforced
evidence: Required keys documented but not validated at runtime
issues.suggestion: Add a shared TypedDict or validation

issues.summary: No integration tests that exercise the full monitor->backtest->autoresearch pipeline
evidence: Tests are unit-level only; no end-to-end pipeline tests
issues.suggestion: Add a simple integration test with synthetic data flowing through the full pipeline
